title: Gurugram court premises sealed after fire damages main building
description: A fire broke out at the district court complex in Gurugram on Sunday, damaging a significant portion of the main court building.The fire reportedly started from the record room of the lower court premises, where paper records were stored. Fire tenders were deployed, and operations continued for several hours to bring the blaze under control.A section of the ceiling collapsed following the fire, affecting parts of the structure.
